title: endlicheria lorastemon
intro: Endlicheria lorastemon, also known as Lorant, is a plant species in the family Lauraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Endlicheria lorastemon include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
